input.memoryNote: After my dad's surgery you drove 3 hours at 2am just to sit with me in the hospital parking lot eating vending machine chips without saying a single word. You didn't need to say anything.

meta.tiktokHook: She drove 3 hours at 2am to sit with me in a hospital parking lot. She didn't say a single word. She didn't need to.
meta.caption: some people just know
meta.whyItWorks: Maximally short, maximally felt. 'Vending machine chips' grounds it. Triggers immediate recognition in anyone who's been through a hard night.
